title: PDF Viewer fit + tight page stack (dbg71)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer now fits sheets correctly at browser 100% zoom (no ~35% horizontal clipping). Fit width is measured from the plan panel, not the scroll column whose width is derived from zoom (that circular measure caused over-scaling). Stack spacing uses cropped visible page height plus a 1px default gap (legacy 8px/2px prefs migrate to 1px).

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg71). Open PDF Viewer with two stacked pages: sheets should fit with side margins, minimal grey between pages.
changeLog: Fit avail width from panel minus library (fixes circular scroll.clientWidth over-scale).
Fit safety 0.95 → 0.90; content width uses visible cropped footprint.
Stack Y uses planBoardViewerPageVisibleFootprint height + 1px gap default.
World bounds extents use visible footprint for tight sync.
Enhanced d9d6c9 ingest logs for 2-page stack diagnostics.
